utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check each for full specification: 1) property: includes selected property description, type, price, features, viewing confirmation and number—satisfies 'selected property with details and price'. 2) financing: includes solution type, amount, source, timeline, advantages—meets 'financing solution with terms'. 3) legal_services: includes firm, attorney, cost, services, file number—meets 'legal services with costs'. 4) moving_services: includes company, cost, services, specialist, booking number—meets 'moving arrangements with costs'. 5) setup_services: includes package, cost, services, service number, timeline—meets 'utility and setup services'. 6) total_budget: includes detailed breakdown (property_cost, closing_costs, legal_services, moving_services, utility_setup, grand_total, remaining_equity)—meets 'complete cost breakdown'. Therefore, all 6/6 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final solution includes selections for a property, financing, legal services, moving services, and utility setup. We must match each to the corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings. The property 'Brant Hills bungalow' does not appear in the ground-truth list, so no rating can be mapped for the property. Financing 'Cash purchase' corresponds to 'Cash Purchase' under purchase_financing with rating 10. Legal services 'Premium Legal Package' matches 'Premium Legal Package' with rating 9. Moving services listed as 'Standard Moving Package' maps to 'Standard Moving' with rating 7. Utility setup 'Premium Utilities Package' maps to 'Premium Utilities' with rating 9.
